creator: pez_098@yahoo.com
text:
this looks like it has been fixed. I had to uninstall and reinstall and see now that there have been updates made and it can now successfully check for updates

# getssl -u
Updated getssl from v2.35 to v2.45
These update notifications can be turned off using the -Q option

Updates are;
.
.
.
# 2021-09-30 better error if curl returns 60 (#709)
# 2021-10-01 Fix -preferred-chain argument (#712)
# 2021-10-01 Show help if no domain specified (#705)(2.44)
# 2021-10-08 Extract release tag from release api using awk (fix BSD issues)
# 2021-10-11 Fix broken upgrade url (#718)(2.45)
